name: Free SEO Analyzer API - 19-Point Audit, Score 0-100 | Ahrefs Alternative
description: Free SEO Audit API - 19 weighted checks, 0-100 score, structured data, CI/CD ready. $9.99 vs Ahrefs $99/mo.
long_description:
## Free Ahrefs API Alternative for On-Page SEO
Get a 19-point SEO audit with weighted scoring (0-100) for any URL. One API call, under $0.0002/page. The on-page analysis you'd pay Ahrefs $99/mo for.

## 19 SEO Checks in One Call
- Title tag (length + presence)
- Meta description (length + presence)
- Heading structure (H1-H6 hierarchy)
- Image alt text coverage
- Internal/external link counts
- Canonical URL validation
- Robots meta directives
- Open Graph tags
- Twitter Card tags
- JSON-LD structured data
- Word count, page size, viewport, favicon, hreflang, language

## Built for CI/CD Pipelines
Add SEO regression checks to GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or any pipeline:
```bash
SCORE=$(curl -s /score?url=https://staging.mysite.com | jq '.seo_score')
if [ "$SCORE" -lt 70 ]; then exit 1; fi
```
Catch missing meta tags, broken heading structure, and lost structured data before deploying.

## Cost Comparison
| | This API | Ahrefs API | Moz API |
|---|---|---|---|
| 500 audits/mo | **FREE** | $99+/mo | $99+/mo |
| 50K audits/mo | **$9.99** | $99+/mo | $99+/mo |

## 4 Granular Endpoints
- `/analyze` — Full 19-point audit
- `/score` — Score only (CI/CD optimized)
- `/headings` — H1-H6 structure
- `/links` — Internal/external link analysis

## Use Cases
- SEO agency client dashboards
- Content team pre-publish validation
- Competitor page analysis
- Site migration QA
- Chrome extension / SaaS product integration

Free tier: 500 audits/month. No credit card required.
